Company Overview

Way.com — America’s dominant automotive super app, powering every mile for over 10 million customers—from auto insurance and parking to EV charging and more. Leveraging cutting-edge AI, machine learning, and advanced data analytics, we deliver innovative, personalized solutions that transform car ownership. Featured by Bloomberg and ranked 48th on Andreessen Horowitz’s Marketplace list of fastest-growing companies worldwide and recognized as the top Product in Insurance by UnitQ, we’re making car ownership easier, more affordable, and more rewarding.

Role Overview

We are seeking a Senior Marketing Operations Manager to own and scale the data engine behind Way’s B2B marketing. This role requires strong operational rigor, deep HubSpot expertise, and a focus on clean, reliable, and actionable data.

Key Responsibilities

  • HubSpot Administration & Optimization
  • Own and administer Way’s HubSpot instance as the platform expert
  • Configure and maintain workflows, lead scoring models, lifecycle stages, and automation
  • Build and optimize forms, landing pages, email templates, and campaign tracking
  • Manage integrations across CRM, sales tools, and martech systems

  • Stay current on HubSpot releases and implement improvements proactively

  • Data Sourcing & Enrichment

  • Source and evaluate B2B contact and account data from third-party providers
  • Manage enrichment tools to improve firmographic and contact data quality
  • Maintain processes for ongoing data refresh

  • Partner with marketing and sales to define ICPs and target account lists

  • Data Quality & Governance

  • Own data verification, deduplication, and normalization across systems
  • Establish and enforce governance standards (fields, naming conventions, validation rules)
  • Build automated workflows to maintain data integrity

  • Conduct regular audits to prevent data decay and inconsistencies

  • Reporting & Analytics

  • Build and maintain dashboards for marketing performance and pipeline tracking
  • Deliver campaign, attribution, and pipeline reporting to leadership
  • Track key metrics such as lead flow, conversion rates, and data quality

  • Translate data into actionable insights to improve performance

  • Martech Stack Management

  • Evaluate, integrate, and manage tools across the martech stack
  • Own vendor relationships for data and technology providers
  • Document system architecture and data flows

  • Ensure reliable data flow across marketing, sales, and analytics systems

  • Process & Operations

  • Design and document lead management processes, including routing, SLAs, and feedback loops
  • Partner closely with sales teams to align on lead definitions, handoff processes, and pipeline tracking
  • Build playbooks for campaigns, webinars, and lifecycle programs
  • Identify bottlenecks and implement automation to improve efficiency and speed

Preferred Skills

  • 6–10 years of experience in marketing operations or related roles
  • Deep hands-on HubSpot expertise (certification preferred)
  • Experience with B2B data sourcing, enrichment, and deduplication at scale
  • Proven ability to improve marketing performance through automation and data-driven processes
  • Familiarity with tools such as ZoomInfo, Apollo, Clearbit, Lusha, or Clay
  • Strong experience in reporting, attribution, and pipeline analysis
  • Understanding of lead management processes and lifecycle design
  • Experience working closely with sales teams to support pipeline growth
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
  • Experience supporting U.S.-focused B2B teams preferred
  • Strong communication and documentation skills
  • Ability to operate in a fast-paced, high-growth environment

What We Look For

  • Clear thinking and simplicity
  • Ownership and accountability
  • Speed with quality
  • Focus on business outcomes
  • Data-driven decision making

What This Role Is (and Isn’t)

This is a hands-on role with full ownership of marketing systems and data. You will execute, build, and optimize—not just oversee. If you prefer strategic oversight without execution, this role is not a fit.

Why Join Way.com

  • Own marketing operations for a scaling B2B business
  • Work across multiple verticals in one ecosystem
  • Shape systems and processes from the ground up
  • Direct impact on pipeline and revenue
  • Be part of a growth-focused, high-ownership team in India with global exposure

Contact

  • Email: careers@way.com
  • Apply Here: Senior Marketing Operations Manager Application
